investment_summary.justification: The EximHub application faces multiple critical technical challenges requiring substantial investment across frontend architecture, build tooling, system integrity verification, performance optimization, and comprehensive UI/UX transformation. This level of investment is essential for production readiness and addressing identification weaknesses.

technical_priority_areas.description: Immediate refactoring of component architecture, resolving typescript configuration issues, optimizing vite build, implementing comprehensive import management and tree-shaking strategies. Critical for application stability and build performance.

Comprehensive link validation, data extraction, structured data processing, asynchronous data handling, and sophisticated API architecture development. Essential foundation for reliable application operation.

Extensive browser testing, accessibility implementation, mobile device support across major platforms, performance optimization for low-end devices, and advanced user flow testing. Crucial for market readiness and user experience quality.

Complex component development for ODOP discovery, advanced card systems, comprehensive filter mechanisms, high-fidelity design system implementation, and enhanced interaction patterns. Core to application value and usability.

project_complexity_level: HIGH - Multi-phase transformation with high-risk components requiring careful coordination

technical_risks: Data integrity challenges with structured processing
risk_assessment.mitigation_strategy: Phase-gated development approach with comprehensive testing at each milestone, dedicated quality assurance protocols, and strict code review processes.

strategic_objectives.outcome: Stable build system, resolved typescript issues, optimized performance baseline

strategic_objectives.objective: Comprehensive Link Validation and System Repair
strategic_objectives.outcome: All external and internal links validated and functional, secure redirects, resolved certificate issues
Hierarchical State → District → Product → Export Actions discovery system

strategic_objectives.objective: Enhanced User Experience and Visual Design
strategic_objectives.outcome: Premium UI/UX with responsive design, semantic color categories, and improved information architecture
Frontend-first implementation with comprehensive testing, error handling, and performance optimization

phase_1_objectives: Fix VRL Logistics and Ecom Express issues

quality_gates: TypeScript passing with zero critical errors
All critical links functional and validated
ODOP discovery working across all sample data
